programmes.show_description: Henderson: US animated comedy series. Stan's childhood imaginary friend returns to collect a debt, and Klaus has a big date and needs a fishbowl upgrade.

Giant Problems: Animated adventure series. Daphne brings the gang to Ireland to visit an ancient Blake family castle, but an angry giant makes them reconsider their view of things...

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Life gets more hectic for the Shepherds as school's out for summer for Nelly and Arthur, and a home photoshoot leads to tension between Billie and Greg.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills

Graham Norton hosts as accountant John, primary school teacher Jess, and care home assistant Paris all get spinning the wheel to try to take home a massive 50,000 pounds.
Reality series. Love is blossoming as the Essex couples go from strength to strength. Elma and Sammy enjoy a double date with Roman and Matilda and Dan and Ella take the next step.
